description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the griest/karma-full-test-env:latest Docker image, with a global before_script that runs `yarn install` and caches the node_modules/ directory. Define three stages: build, test, and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that runs `npm run build`, stores the dist/ and lib/ directories as artifacts, and runs only on tags and the master branch; also add a docs job that runs `npm run docs`, stores the public/ directory as an artifact, and runs only on tags and master. In the test stage add a lint job that runs `npm run lint` and a test job that runs `npm run test -- --single-run --browsers Chrome`, creates a public/reports directory, copies test/reports/unit into it, moves test/reports/coverage/lcov-report to public/reports/coverage, and publishes the public/ directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that depends on test and docs, runs `echo Building Pages`, publishes the public/ artifact to GitLab Pages, and runs only on the master branch; also add a publish job that depends on build, docs, and test, writes an npm auth token to ~/.npmrc using the NPM_TOKEN variable, runs `npm publish`, and runs only on tags.
